retry_reason: Retry would not revive a dead/dying object; failure indicates refcount is zero (object being freed) or p is NULL.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that conditionally acquires a reference on an aa_profile object. It returns NULL if the object is NULL or if its reference count has already reached zero (object is dying). The caller must check the return value; if non-NULL, the caller owns a new reference and must later release it with a corresponding put function (e.g., aa_put_profile). If NULL, the object is no longer alive and must not be used. This function does not transfer pre-existing ownership; it is an acquire operation for a live object.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to conditionally acquire a reference on an aa_profile object via kref_get_unless_zero, returning the object if successful or NULL otherwise. The only additional logic is a NULL check.

check.reason: The function returns p after successfully incrementing its refcount via kref_get_unless_zero on p->label.count.count. The access path from the returned p to the atomic field is p.label.count.refcount.refs, matching the callee's path and type chain. The segment count (5) equals the type chain count (5).
